name: fix-progress-update
title: Fix orchestrator progress/current_agent stale after ideate stage
description: Orchestrator only writes run.progress/current_agent before ideate→script transition then returns. All subsequent stages (script, visualize, storyboard, animate, finalize) leave progress stuck at 8.33% and current_agent='director'. Frontend progress bar appears frozen even while pipeline runs. Fix: update progress/current_agent at each stage boundary in app/agents/orchestrator.py around _run_phase2_graph / _invoke_phase2_graph.
creator: c
